titleStmt.title: SII 35.99A: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 99a. (A.R. No. 42 of 1950-51.)

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 15th year of the reign of Mallidēva, Khara, Chaitra śu. 5, Monday. The date corresponds with A.D. 1231, 10th March, Monday.
It records a gift of land to the teacher Śāntivarma for offerings to the god Kaḍambēśvara at Aḷayasiriyūr by Jñānasiṁgi-gavuḍa when Mallidēva was governing Banavase-12000 and Hānumgal-500.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara vīragadaṁbamallikā¨rjuna
dēvaru banavāsepanni¨rcāsiramumaṁ pānuṁgalainūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamiralu Eḍavoḷaleppattaṟa baḷiya bā Aḷayasiriyūra mādabōvaṁge kāruṇyaṁge
ydu kuḍalu mādabōvanalliya śrīkaḍaṁbēśvaradēva¨rgge 60 neya rākṣasasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa suddha
puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdu dēvaraṁgabhōgani biṭṭa gadde dēvarakeyiṁbaḍaga kamma mūvattu bāduṁ
beyalli hakkalu mattaroṁduṁ . śrīkaḍaṁbēśvaradēvara rāsipaṁḍita¨rgge dēvara keyiṁ baḍaga biṭṭa ga¨rdde kamma
[Aiva]ttu śrī kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvaralli yaṁ māḍi dēvara naivēdyakke biṭṭa ga
dde dēvara keyiṁ teṁka kamma hattu © ya pratiṣṭeyaṁ māḍi dēviyara
nayivēdyakke biṭṭa ga¨rdde nārāyaṇa teṁka kamma hattu © kaṭṭina
kke honna kuṟuvadoṁge biṭṭa du © śrīmatukādaṁbacakra
va¨rtti kaligaḷaṁkusa maṁlidēvanā banavāsepaṁnni¨rcchāsira
hānuṁgalainoṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamira
lu sa¨rvadhikāri maddareya kā jñānasiṁgigavuḍa Aḷeyasi
rivūra śrī kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōga nayivēdyakkaṁ 15 neya khara saṁvatsara
da caitra su 5 sōmavāradaṁdu Iśānyada koḷana keḷage biṭṭa ga
dde kaṁ 40 holatikeṟeya keḷage mūḍagavuḍaṁ baḷiyoḷage
kaṁ 20 maṁ staḷavrittiyāgi sa¨rvvanamasya dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi Ācā
¨ryyaśāṁtiva¨rmarige koṭṭaṁ mallidēva gabhyudaya maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 35.99A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
